title: Project LOTM
description: Project LOTM brings the world of "Lord of the Mysteries" to Minecraft, adding items, abilities, and more from the popular web novel.
body:
If you have any questions, ideas, or just wish to talk, then join the Discord 



Project LOTM brings the world of "Lord of the Mysteries" to Minecraft, adding items, abilities, and more from the popular web novel.

Players enhance their strength by consuming specific potions, following distinct progression paths. Current pathways include:

Apprentice → Trickmaster → Astrologer → Scribe → Traveler → Secrets Sorcerer

Secrets Supplicant → Listener → Shadow Ascetic → Rose Bishop → Shepherd

Warrior → Pugilist → Weapon Master → Dawn Paladin → Guardian → Demon Hunter (abilities coming soon)

Hunter → Provoker → Pyromaniac → Conspirer

Seer

Sailor

Commands:

removebeyonder <Username>

Keybinds:

R: Use Ability
C: Cycle through Abilities
X: Open sheperd menu (Should only be used by those who are a sheperd of above otherwise might cause errors)

!WARNING!

1. Many potions currently lack recipes so must be gotten through creative

2. I'm not a completely experienced modder so there are bound to be bugs

3. Many abilities are probably not balanced though I promise I will listen to feedback and refine them through time

![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/D3hl02B.png)
[Click here to support my projects!](https://t.ly/fyYNR)
